title: veronica × grisea
intro: Veronica × grisea, also known as the Veronica cross, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Veronica genus and is native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Veronica × grisea include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and relieve symptoms of respiratory infections such as coughs and colds. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
